heading: REQUIREMENTS RELATING TO HEALTH INSURANCE COVERAGE
label: XXV REQUIREMENTS RELATING TO HEALTH INSURANCE COVERAGE
notes: Codification, , , substituted “REQUIREMENTS RELATING TO HEALTH INSURANCE COVERAGE” for “ASSURING PORTABILITY, AVAILABILITY, AND RENEWABILITY OF HEALTH INSURANCE COVERAGE” as subchapter heading.Pub. L. 104–204, title VI, § 604(a)(1)110 Stat. 2938Sept. 26, 1996

Prior ProvisionsA prior subchapter XXV (§ 300aaa et seq.), comprised of title XXVII of the Public Health Service Act, , §§ 2701 to 2714, was renumbered title II, part B, §§ 231 to 244, of the Public Health Service Act, and transferred to part B (§ 238 et seq.) of subchapter I of this chapter.act July 1, 1944, ch. 373
